questions.statement:
<span style=" font-weight: 700;">Select the option that expresses the given sentence in the reported speech.</span><br style="" />
<span style="">My friend Ravi said to me, &quot;Let us wait for our friends.&quot;</span>
options: <span style="">My friend Ravi told me&nbsp;</span><span style="">that I should wait for our friends.</span> /
<span style="">My friend Ravi told me&nbsp;</span><span style="">that we should wait for my friends.</span> /
My friend Ravi told me that we should wait for our friends. /
<span style="">My friend Ravi said me&nbsp;</span><span style="">that we should wait for our friends.</span> /

questions.statement:
<p><strong>Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word.</strong></p>

<p>Even where we least like him we find nothing small or mean to <u><strong>alienate</strong></u> our respect from him.</p>

<p>Select the most appropriate meaning of the underlined idiom.</p>

<p>Sanchit stands by his friends <u>through thick and thin</u>.</p>
Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank No. 1.
Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank No. 2.
Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank No 3.
Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank No. 4.
Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank No. 5.
